provider.api_key_tooltip: Encrypted at rest in the Neural Vault. Never sent to the frontend in plaintext.
provider.endpoint_tooltip: The base URL for the API. Change this for local nodes (e.g., Ollama) or proxies.
provider.external_id_tooltip: A custom ID sent in headers to help track requests on the provider's side.
provider.persistence_tooltip: Stores the API key on the backend engine. REQUIRED for background scheduled jobs to function when the browser is closed.
provider.persistence_desc: Allow autonomous jobs to use this key without the Neural Vault active.
provider.protocol_tooltip: Determines which communication standard (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) the engine uses.
provider.test_trace_tooltip: Initiate a neural handshake with the provider to verify API connectivity and protocol integrity.
provider.headers_tooltip: Additional JSON-formatted headers to include in every request.
provider.audio_model_tooltip: The specific model used for neural transcription (STT).
provider.audio_model_hint: * Select a suggested node from your inventory or enter a custom identifier.
provider.add_node_tooltip: Add a new intelligence node (model) to this provider's ecosystem.
provider.rpm_tooltip: Requests Per Minute: Maximum number of API calls allowed per minute.
provider.tpm_tooltip: Tokens Per Minute: Maximum throughput allowed per minute.
provider.commit_node_tooltip: Commit and forge new intelligence node.
provider.sync_tooltip: Synchronize provider infrastructure settings with the Neural Vault and update dependent agent nodes.
provider.handshake_blocked: Handshake Blocked: Missing {{missing}}. Connectivity testing requires these fields.

forge_item.tooltip_delete: Delete model node from forge inventory.
forge_item.tooltip_rpm: Requests Per Minute: Maximum number of API calls allowed per minute.
forge_item.tooltip_tpm: Tokens Per Minute: Maximum throughput allowed per minute.

model_store.title: Intelligence Store
model_store.description: Browse and deploy high-performance LLMs directly to your local swarm nodes. All models are vetted for privacy and performance.
model_store.hardware_profile_desc: Tadpole OS automatically calculates VRAM pressure and quantization requirements before initiating a pull. We recommend ensuring at least 2GB of headroom per running model.

header.tooltip_lock: Secure administrative session and hide sensitive keys

vault.title: NEURAL VAULT
vault.tooltip: Infrastructure Lock: Master encryption key active
vault.reset_desc: This will permanently delete all encrypted provider configurations. This action cannot be undone.
vault.secure_context_required: Crypto operations require HTTPS or localhost

grid.title: AI PROVIDER INFRASTRUCTURE
grid.tooltip_add: Register a new AI provider (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)
grid.empty_state: No AI Providers detected in the neural grid.
grid.empty_hint: Initialize a provider to start orchestration.

inventory.title: MODEL INVENTORY
inventory.tooltip_provision: Add a new model node to your inventory
inventory.empty_state: No intelligence nodes provisioned in this sector.
inventory.empty_hint: Provision a node to enable autonomous mission execution.
inventory.btn_add_disabled_tooltip: Register a provider before provisioning model nodes.

dialogs.terminate_provider_desc: Are you sure you want to terminate provider "{{name}}"? This will also decommission all associated model nodes.
dialogs.decommission_node_desc: Are you sure you want to decommission model node "{{name}}"?
